page.title: Consultation research metrics
page.subtitle: De-identified aggregate metrics across the whole cohort, presented to international journal figure and statistical-reporting standards
page.error: Failed to load research metrics. Please retry later.

demographics.title: Table 1. Patient characteristics
demographics.subtitle: Patient-level demographics and case mix (the baseline table every clinical paper needs)

cohort.title: Cohort flow & weekly trend
cohort.subtitle: Weekly enrolled sessions and completions (CONSORT-style flow)
cohort.footnote: {{total}} sessions enrolled: {{completed}} completed, {{aborted}} red-flag aborted, {{cancelled}} cancelled.

efficiency.title: Consultation efficiency distributions
efficiency.subtitle: Duration / turns / chars-per-turn for terminal sessions (box plots: median, IQR, Tukey whiskers, outliers)
efficiency.footnote: Distributions are shown as box plots rather than bar graphs, which conceal data structure (Weissgerber 2015, PLOS Biology).

hpi.title: History-taking completeness (10 HPI fields)
hpi.subtitle: Share of SOAP reports capturing each field (AMIE history-taking axis)
hpi.footnote: Denominator is {{count}} generated reports; bar length is the fill rate.

safety.title: Triage safety
safety.subtitle: Red-flag detection and physician acknowledgement (symptom-checker triage safety metrics)
safety.footnote: Proportions carry Wilson score 95% CIs (error bars); denominators are terminal sessions or alert count.
safety.urgencySubtitle: Overall plan urgency from the AI (with monotonic red-flag escalation) and detection-layer confidence

stt.title: Speech recognition quality
stt.subtitle: STT confidence histogram (exp(avg_logprob) proxy, 0–1)
stt.footnote: Denominator is {{count}} voice turns with a confidence score.

documentation.title: AI documentation quality
documentation.subtitle: SOAP quality and physician review outcomes (pragmatic proxy in the spirit of PDQI-9)
documentation.footnote: Agreement / verification rates carry Wilson 95% CIs; denominator is {{count}} generated reports.

forest.title: Red-flag rate by language subgroup (forest plot)
forest.subtitle: Point estimate and Wilson 95% CI of red-flag rate per language (terminal sessions); dashed line is the overall rate
forest.footnote: Marker size reflects subgroup size; wider CIs indicate smaller n and warrant cautious interpretation.

table.title: Per-language subgroup summary
table.subtitle: Subgroup comparison for multilingual deployment (full table behind the forest plot)

methods.title: Methods crosswalk (publication guidance)
methods.subtitle: Frameworks these metrics and figures align with; use them to draft Methods and reporting checklists
methods.decideAi: Reporting guideline for early-stage clinical evaluation of AI decision support (Nature Medicine 2022) — this system is a small-scale live evaluation; map each of its 17 AI-specific items when submitting
methods.amie: Evaluation axes for conversational diagnostic AI: history-taking completeness, diagnostic accuracy, management, and empathic communication — the HPI completeness panel maps to its history-taking axis
methods.triage: Triage safety is reported as sensitivity/specificity and under-triage rate (JMIR and others) — red-flag rate, detection latency and acknowledgement rate here are the corresponding process metrics; a formal paper needs physician adjudication as the gold standard
methods.pdqi: 9-dimension physician documentation quality instrument — physician approval rate here is a pragmatic proxy; for publication, sample notes for dual-rater PDQI-9 scoring and report ICC/kappa
methods.stats: Continuous data are shown as box-plot distributions (not bar graphs, Weissgerber 2015); proportions carry Wilson score 95% CIs with numerator/denominator (SAMPL guideline); subgroups use a forest plot. Every figure exports as a vector SVG for typesetting.
methods.disclaimer: All figures are de-identified aggregates. Formal publication requires IRB approval, a pre-registered analysis plan, and confidence intervals appropriate to the sample size.
